case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC VS. FRANCISCA FLORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-10-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCA AKA NANCY FLORES $1,715.95 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $367.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,507.95, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY (TRANSACTION ID # 100034755) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033058), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-12-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCA AKA NANCY FLORES
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034755) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCA AKA NANCY FLORES

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's Motion For Entry of Judgment Pursuant to Written Stipulation of All Parties.

Plaintiff Unifund CCR, LLC's motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation of all parties is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
